label: bug_report
subject: App crashes on startup
text: Every time I open the app on my iPhone 14 it crashes immediately after the splash screen. I've tried reinstalling but the problem persists. Running iOS 17.2.

label: bug_report
subject: Images not loading on product page
text: Product images on the website are broken — I just see a gray box. This started happening yesterday. I'm using Chrome 121 on Windows 11.

label: bug_report
subject: Export to CSV downloads empty file
text: When I click 'Export to CSV' on my dashboard the file downloads but it's completely empty. The data shows fine in the UI. Tried Firefox and Edge same result.

label: bug_report
subject: Notifications not being sent
text: I set up email notifications for new orders but I'm not receiving any emails. My spam folder is clean. Tested with a test order and no email came through.

label: bug_report
subject: Search returns no results for valid queries
text: Searching for 'laptop' or 'headphones' in the search bar returns zero results even though I can see those products when I browse categories. Search seems completely broken.

label: bug_report
subject: Two-factor authentication code rejected
text: My 2FA codes keep saying 'invalid code' even though I'm entering them immediately. My phone's time is synced. This is blocking me from logging in.

label: bug_report
subject: Payment form throws 500 error
text: When I try to complete checkout and click 'Pay Now' I get a generic 500 internal server error. I've tried three different credit cards. Cart items are still there.

label: bug_report
subject: Dark mode text is unreadable
text: After the latest update enabling dark mode makes the text in the settings panel turn black-on-dark-gray and I can't read anything. Please fix ASAP.

label: bug_report
subject: API returns 401 with valid token
text: Our integration is suddenly getting 401 Unauthorized responses on the /v2/orders endpoint. The API key hasn't changed and was working fine until this morning.

label: bug_report
subject: Calendar sync duplicating events
text: Since I connected Google Calendar every event is showing up three times. I disconnected and reconnected and the duplicates are still there.

label: bug_report
subject: Video upload stuck at 99%
text: Uploading any video file gets stuck at 99% indefinitely. I've waited over an hour. The file size is around 200MB. Tried on Chrome and Safari.

label: bug_report
subject: Report generation hangs forever
text: Clicking 'Generate Report' shows a spinner but never finishes. Left it running for 45 minutes before giving up. This used to take about 30 seconds.

label: bug_report
subject: Dropdown menu options not clickable on mobile
text: On my Android phone when I tap on a dropdown menu in the checkout form the options appear but none of them respond to taps. Site version not app.

label: bug_report
subject: Data not saving after session expires
text: If my session times out while I'm editing a form and I log back in all my changes are lost. There's no warning that the session expired before I hit save.

label: bug_report
subject: Wrong currency displayed for EU accounts
text: My account is set to EUR but all prices are displaying in USD. This happened after your maintenance window last Tuesday. Region settings still show Europe/Berlin.

label: bug_report
subject: Mobile app freezes when adding items
text: The iOS app completely freezes for 10+ seconds whenever I try to add something to my cart. Sometimes it crashes after the freeze.

label: bug_report
subject: Login page infinite loop
text: After I enter my credentials on the login page it just spins and never actually logs me in. I've tried three different browsers.

label: bug_report
subject: Checkout page missing shipping options
text: The shipping options dropdown on checkout is completely empty. I can't select a shipping method so I can't complete my purchase.

label: bug_report
subject: Receipt email never arrives
text: After purchasing I get an order confirmation page but the receipt email never arrives. I need that for my records.

label: bug_report
subject: Map widget not loading
text: The store location map on the contact page just shows a gray box. The map isn't loading even though Google Maps is working fine on other sites.

label: bug_report
subject: Filter results not updating
text: When I click on price or category filters nothing happens. The products don't filter and no error message appears.

label: bug_report
subject: Sorting dropdown broken
text: When I select 'Sort by Price' or 'Sort by Rating' the products stay in the same order. The sort isn't working at all.

label: bug_report
subject: Share button produces broken link
text: When I try to share a product the link generated doesn't work. It shows a 404 error when I click it.

label: bug_report
subject: Password reset email contains wrong link
text: The password reset email has a link but when I click it I get 'token expired' even though I clicked immediately. The link might be malformed.

label: bug_report
subject: Wishlist items disappearing
text: Items I added to my wishlist keep disappearing. When I refresh the page several items are gone.

label: bug_report
subject: Chat support widget not responding
text: The chat box opens but messages don't send. The send button doesn't work no matter how many times I click it.

label: bug_report
subject: Page layout broken on tablet
text: When I view the site on my iPad everything is jumbled. Text overlaps with images and buttons are cut off.

label: bug_report
subject: Form field validation too strict
text: The form rejects my address as 'invalid' but it's a real valid address. I can't complete the signup because of this.

label: bug_report
subject: Download attachment returns 404
text: When I try to download an invoice PDF I get a 404 error. The file might be missing from your server.

label: bug_report
subject: Search autocomplete shows irrelevant results
text: When I start typing in the search bar the suggestions are completely off-topic and not helpful.

label: bug_report
subject: Database connection error on some pages
text: Occasionally when I load product pages I see a 'database connection error' message. Refreshing usually fixes it but it's unreliable.

label: bug_report
subject: Confirmation dialog keeps reappearing
text: When I delete an item a confirmation dialog pops up but even after I click Yes it pops up again immediately.

label: bug_report
subject: Double-clicking items adds multiple quantities
text: If I accidentally double-click 'Add to Cart' it adds the item multiple times instead of once.

label: bug_report

text: When I try to view my full order history the page hangs. It probably has too many records to load at once.

label: bug_report
subject: Email field won't accept certain domains
text: When I try to sign up with my company email from a less common domain the form says it's invalid. But I can receive emails there.

label: bug_report
subject: Notification badge count wrong
text: The notification bell shows 5 unread messages but when I click it there are only 2. The count is inaccurate.

label: bug_report
subject: Search doesn't work with special characters
text: Searching for products with dashes or underscores in the name returns no results. The search doesn't handle special characters.

label: bug_report
subject: Logout doesn't clear session
text: After I logout I can still access my account by hitting the back button. The session isn't being properly destroyed.

label: bug_report
subject: File upload accepts wrong file types
text: I can upload a .exe file on the form even though it should only accept images. There's no file type validation.

label: bug_report
subject: Loading spinner never stops
text: Sometimes the loading spinner on the dashboard just keeps spinning forever. The page never finishes loading even though there's no network issue.

label: bug_report
subject: Pagination not working correctly
text: When I click page 2 or 3 the URL changes but the same products stay on screen. The pagination doesn't actually navigate between pages.

label: bug_report
subject: Memory leak causes app slowdown
text: After using the app for 30 minutes it gets noticeably slower and more sluggish. The app isn't releasing memory properly.

label: bug_report
subject: Color picker returning wrong hex values
text: When I select a color with the color picker the hex value saved is different from what I selected.

label: bug_report
subject: Print stylesheet broken
text: When I try to print the page or use Print to PDF it looks completely different from the screen. The print styles aren't working.

label: bug_report
subject: Autocorrect making changes without consent
text: The form fields have aggressive autocorrect that's changing my text as I type. I can't disable it.

label: bug_report
subject: Service worker not updating
text: New code changes aren't showing up because the old service worker is cached. Users need to do a hard refresh to see updates.

label: bug_report
subject: Timezone handling causing wrong dates
text: Events and orders are showing dates that are off by one day. The timezone handling seems broken.

label: bug_report

text: Sometimes placeholder text from the HTML remains visible in production instead of being replaced by actual content.

label: bug_report
subject: Event listeners not cleaning up
text: After navigating between pages the old event listeners are still firing. This is causing duplicate actions and memory issues.

label: bug_report
subject: Console errors not being logged
text: Errors in the browser console aren't being captured by the error tracking system. We can't debug issues from production.

label: bug_report
subject: Integer overflow causing incorrect totals
text: Orders with many items show incorrect totals. The subtotal calculation seems to overflow with large quantities.

label: bug_report

label: bug_report

label: bug_report

label: bug_report

label: bug_report

label: bug_report
